# Backtest Reports

*Generated by `sportslab backtest <season>`.*

The backtest evaluates the incumbent model
(**Standard Elo + qb_changed + rolling_mov_3 + Platt**) across each NFL season.
Seasons 2022–2024 are in-training diagnostics (part of 2021–2024 training data).
Season 2025 is a locked holdout.

## Season-by-Season Analysis

### 2022 Season

| Artifact | Description | Status |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [Full Report](reports/backtests/2022_backtest_report.md) | Comprehensive Markdown report | OK |
| [Weekly Summary](reports/backtests/2022_weekly_summary.csv) | Week-by-week breakdown | OK |
| [Team Summary](reports/backtests/2022_team_summary.csv) | Per-team diagnostics | OK |
| [Calibration Buckets](reports/backtests/2022_calibration_buckets.csv) | Confidence bucket analysis | OK |
| [Extreme Games](reports/backtests/2022_extreme_games.csv) | Best/worst predictions | OK |

## Key Metrics (2025 Holdout)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Games | 276 |
| Log loss | **0.6262** |
| Accuracy | 0.6630 |
| Brier score | 0.2180 |
| ROC AUC | 0.7050 |

## Research Caveats

- The model was trained on 2021–2024 data only. 2025 was a locked holdout.
- Seasons 2022–2024 were part of the training window and are diagnostic only.
- Market data is excluded from the model. Market diagnostic only (closing moneyline: 0.6090).
- This is a probabilistic prediction benchmark, not a gambling product.
